hero.tagline: I build tools that watch loops.
hero.sub: DevOps engineer · AI-native platform builder · CyberArk. I make infrastructure that monitors agents instead of running in them.

now.shipping: skit MVP — AIC distribution platform demo
now.reading: Anthropic agent papers, Strands SDK source
now.talking: Self-Hosted AI Kickoff series · weekly · CyberArk R&D

projects.name: code-koala
projects.desc: AI code reviewer running inside CyberArk's GitHub Enterprise. Lambda + Bedrock + Claude Opus 4.7. Self-serve install, multi-org adoption.

projects.name: skit
projects.desc: Package manager for AI capabilities — skills, subagents, rules — across Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf. The npm of AICs.

projects.name: brif
projects.desc: Mission-aware statusline and dashboard for Claude Code. Real-time ctx%, cost, model, branch.

projects.name: amit-hub
projects.desc: AI-agent-native worktree orchestrator. CLI + VS Code ext + Claude Code MCP plugin, one TS core.

projects.name: workwright
projects.desc: Playwright for terminals — MCP server for visible, AI-driveable PTY sessions with live browser viewer.

projects.name: whetstone
projects.desc: Mentor AI system for continuity and drift control. Session notes, daily/weekly history, scope hooks.

writing.title: the package manager nobody asked for.
